title: limonium doerfleri
intro: Limonium doerfleri, also known as the Doerfler's sea lavender or Doerfler's sea-purslane, is a type of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. This plant is often used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Limonium doerfleri include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, which may help to prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Limonium doerfleri include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically to soothe skin irritations and promote healing.
